violations.text: The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

The wall and ceiling in the kitchen area by the small chest freezer and storage cabinet is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2025
